book.atomiccore.name: Atomic tome
book.atomiccore.subtitle: The Atomic Series.
book.atomiccore.landing_text: Guide book for mods from $(l)$(#7118BC)$(l:curiosities/the_atomic_series)The Atomic Series$(). $(br2)This guide book will extend as you add more mods from $(l)$(#7118BC)$(l:curiosities/the_atomic_series)The Atomic Series$(). The categories for each mod will appear on the right.
book.atomiccore.category.curiosities.des: Here you will find interesting facts about $(l)$(#7118BC)$(l:curiosities/the_atomic_series)The Atomic Series$() project and its creators.
$(l)$(#7118BC)The Atomic Series$() is a project created by $(l)$(l:curiosities/creators)Hantonik$(). $(br2)All the mods in this series are connected with each other, but you don't have to add them all to make everything work.
To run any mod from this series, the $(l)$(#00A5FF)Atomic Core$() library is required. It contains the necessary elements for the functioning of each mod from $(l)$(#7118BC)The Atomic Series$().

If you want to have a full game experience with mods from this series, you can install the $(l)$(#FF0072)Atomic Technology$() mod. This mod adds all mods from $(l)$(#7118BC)The Atomic Series$() to the game as one. Thanks to this, you do not have to worry if you are missing any of the modifications.

$(l)$(#75EA00)Atomic Components$() is a modification that adds materials needed to build machines to the game. It contains metals of various kinds in various components for machines and their alloys with different properties. $(l)No machines can be made without this modification!$()

$(l)$(#FF8800)Atomic Machines$() is a mod that adds interesting machines that can be useful in the game. $(br)$(l)Energy is essential$(), without it no machine will work, here you will find a way to produce it and use it to create amazing things such as $(l)cables$(), $(l)logic processors$(), $(l)resource storages$() and even $(l)more durable materials$()!
book.atomiccore.entry.creators.page.1: All mod makers of $(l)$(#7118BC)$(l:curiosities/the_atomic_series)The Atomic Series$() are listed here. $(br2)Idea creator, artist and programmer - $(l)$(#FF2E00)Hantonik$()
